name: chakra-ui-migrate
tagline: Guides a step-by-step Chakra UI v2-to-v3 migration: packages, codemod, provider, color mode, prop renames, and compound components.
verdict: Strong, safety-conscious migration guide: dry-run-first codemod, commit-before-manual-edits, a validation checklist, and a pointer to a deeper theming skill when scope grows. No security concerns found. Only real gaps are cosmetic: installs of well-known packages aren't version-pinned, and there's no version/changelog signal on the skill itself.

highlights.summary: `npm install @chakra-ui/react @emotion/react` (line 71) and equivalents install well-known packages with no version pin.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
